title: Grilled Venezuelan Chicken Skewers
description: Tender chicken skewers marinated in a flavorful Venezuelan-inspired mixture, grilled to perfection. Serve with a side of your favorite rice, beans, or salad.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sofrito, onion, bell pepper, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the marinated chicken cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
